records.question: Which addresses are exactly 045 Marquardt Village Suite 484 and are associated with both customers and delivery route locations?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT addresses.address_id FROM addresses
JOIN customer_addresses ON addresses.address_id = customer_addresses.address_id
JOIN delivery_route_locations ON addresses.address_id = delivery_route_locations.location_address_id
WHERE addresses.address_details = '045 Marquardt Village Suite 484'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a.address_id
FROM Addresses a
WHERE a.address_details = '045 Marquardt Village Suite 484'
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM Customer_Addresses ca WHERE ca.address_id = a.address_id
)
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM Delivery_Route_Locations drl WHERE drl.location_address_id = a.address_id
)

records.question: Which addresses in Maine have the details exactly 6187 Feil Extension Apt. 749, were classified as House from 2010-12-29 11:01:39 to 2018-03-22 02:54:10, and belong to customers with email tkassulke@example.com who became customers on or after 2012-01-11 21:17:01?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT addresses.address_id FROM addresses
JOIN customer_addresses ON addresses.address_id = customer_addresses.address_id
JOIN customers ON customer_addresses.customer_id = customers.customer_id
WHERE addresses.state_province_county = 'Maine' AND customer_addresses.address_type = 'House' AND customer_addresses.date_to = '2018-03-22 02:54:10' AND customer_addresses.date_from = '2010-12-29 11:01:39' AND customers.date_became_customer >= '2012-01-11 21:17:01' AND addresses.address_details = '6187 Feil Extension Apt. 749' AND customers.customer_email = 'tkassulke@example.com'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a.address_id
FROM Addresses a
JOIN Customer_Addresses ca ON a.address_id = ca.address_id
JOIN Customers c ON ca.customer_id = c.customer_id
WHERE a.state_province_county = 'Maine'
  AND a.address_details = '6187 Feil Extension Apt. 749'
  AND ca.address_type = 'House'
  AND ca.date_from = '2010-12-29 11:01:39'
  AND ca.date_to = '2018-03-22 02:54:10'
  AND c.customer_email = 'tkassulke@example.com'
  AND c.date_became_customer >= '2012-01-11 21:17:01'

records.question: Which addresses at 615 Adams Rue Apt. 095 in Sawaynville, Kentucky, zip code 575, USA, are linked to an employee named Sasha with phone number 1-547-775-6049?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT addresses.address_id FROM addresses
JOIN employees ON addresses.address_id = employees.employee_address_id
WHERE addresses.country = 'USA' AND addresses.address_details = '615 Adams Rue Apt. 095' AND addresses.zip_postcode = '575' AND addresses.city = 'Sawaynville' AND addresses.state_province_county = 'Kentucky' AND employees.employee_phone = '1-547-775-6049' AND employees.employee_name = 'Sasha'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a.address_id
FROM Addresses a
JOIN Employees e ON a.address_id = e.employee_address_id
WHERE a.address_details = '615 Adams Rue Apt. 095'
AND a.city = 'Sawaynville'
AND a.state_province_county = 'Kentucky'
AND a.zip_postcode = '575'
AND a.country = 'USA'
AND e.employee_name = 'Sasha'
AND e.employee_phone = '1-547-775-6049'

records.question: Which addresses in Wyoming, USA have zip code 234 and are linked to an employee with phone number 620.905.4152x7146?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT addresses.address_id FROM addresses
JOIN customer_addresses ON addresses.address_id = customer_addresses.address_id
JOIN employees ON addresses.address_id = employees.employee_address_id
WHERE addresses.zip_postcode = '234' AND employees.employee_phone = '620.905.4152x7146' AND addresses.state_province_county = 'Wyoming' AND addresses.country = 'USA'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a.address_id
FROM Addresses a
JOIN Employees e ON a.address_id = e.employee_address_id
WHERE a.state_province_county = 'Wyoming'
AND a.country = 'USA'
AND a.zip_postcode = '234'
AND e.employee_phone = '620.905.4152x7146'

records.question: Where are the addresses at 203 Joseph Hills in Giovannaton, Tennessee that are House type listed from 2011-05-24 21:49:34 and linked to employee Cristian whose phone is 1-833-492-9430?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT addresses.address_id FROM addresses
JOIN customer_addresses ON addresses.address_id = customer_addresses.address_id
JOIN employees ON addresses.address_id = employees.employee_address_id
WHERE addresses.city = 'Giovannaton' AND addresses.address_details = '203 Joseph Hills' AND employees.employee_phone = '1-833-492-9430' AND addresses.state_province_county = 'Tennessee' AND customer_addresses.date_from = '2011-05-24 21:49:34' AND customer_addresses.address_type = 'House' AND employees.employee_name = 'Cristian'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT a.address_id
FROM Addresses a
JOIN Customer_Addresses ca ON a.address_id = ca.address_id
JOIN Customers c ON ca.customer_id = c.customer_id
JOIN Employees e ON e.employee_address_id = a.address_id
WHERE a.address_details = '203 Joseph Hills'
AND a.city = 'Giovannaton'
AND a.state_province_county = 'Tennessee'
AND ca.address_type = 'House'
AND ca.date_from = '2011-05-24 21:49:34'
AND e.employee_name = 'Cristian'
AND e.employee_phone = '1-833-492-9430'
